units.lean_file_body:
open Finset
open Nat

theorem vandermonde_nat (a b n : ℕ) : (a + b).choose n = ∑ k in range (n + 1), (a.choose k) * (b.choose (n - k)) := by
  rw [Nat.add_choose_eq, Finset.Nat.sum_antidiagonal_eq_sum_range_succ (fun i j => a.choose i * b.choose j) n]
notes: Uses Nat.add_choose_eq (Vandermonde identity via antidiagonal) and Finset.Nat.sum_antidiagonal_eq_sum_range_succ to rewrite to the desired sum over range (n+1).
